item.title: Why Does Donald Trump Refuse to Defend America?
item.description: The president has long articulated a moral equivalence between the country’s interests and those of dictatorships.
item.dc:creator: Tom Nichols

item.title: San Diego’s Tragic Lesson About Terrorism
item.description: The attack on an Islamic center exemplified a danger that the Trump administration would rather ignore.
item.dc:creator: Juliette Kayyem

item.title: Trump’s $1.8 Billion Slush Fund Is Worse Than Stealing
item.description: Recasting the January 6 insurrection as the work of heroic patriots remains the president’s highest priority.
item.dc:creator: Jonathan Chait

item.title: A Cheap Fix for Urban Crime
item.description: Instead of expanding arrests, try adding better lights.
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Glazer

item.title: Democracy Is a Racial Entitlement Now
item.description: The all-out assault on Black voting
item.dc:creator: Adam Serwer

item.title: The Most Interesting Part of Trump’s Prayer Rally
item.dc:creator: Stephanie McCrummen

item.title: Something Big Is Happening on Campus
item.description: There’s a lot going right at universities, if you’re only willing to see it.
item.dc:creator: David Brooks

item.title: Barney Frank’s Second Coming-Out
item.description: In his final act, the liberal stalwart wants to save his party from ideologues.
item.dc:creator: James Kirchick

item.title: Xi Jinping Was Only Humoring Trump
item.description: In Beijing, a lame-duck president personified the decline of American power.
item.dc:creator: Franklin Foer

item.title: The Best Graduation Speech Is One Nobody Remembers
item.description: The commencement speech is a ritual act, not an expressive one.
item.dc:creator: Ian Bogost
